text:
The NOA must be submitted timely. All HHAs must submit an NOA to their Medicare 
contractor within 5 calendar days from the start of care date to establish that the 
beneficiary is under a Medicare home health period of care and also to trigger home 
health consolidated billing edits required under section 1842(b)(6)(F) of the Act. For 
example, if the start of care date is January 1, 2022, the NOA would be considered 
timely-filed if it is submitted on or before January 6, 2022. 
Example:
